_date_from_comment: ISO 8601 string ('2026-01-01' or '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z'). Null = no lower bound. Used by STEP 4.1.
_date_to_comment: ISO 8601 string. Null = no upper bound. Used by STEP 4.1.
_runtime_paths_comment: Optional runtime overrides and execution-only passthrough columns are defined in config_step_1.1_runtime.json.
_feature_space_config_json_comment: Optional override for the dedicated feature-space definition file. Null uses MINGO_DICTIONARY_CREATION_AND_TEST/config_step_1.2_feature_space.json.
_z_position_config_comment: Set to [z1, z2, z3, z4] to select a specific z config, e.g. [0.0, 100.0, 200.0, 400.0]. If null, a random one is chosen.
_common_feature_space_comment: Single source of truth for inference feature-space selection across STEP 1.2 continuity, STEP 2.1, STEP 3.3, and STEP 4.2. Step-local step_2_1 values with the same keys override this block only when explicitly set.

step_1_1._path_overrides_comment: Optional simulation_params_csv override is defined at top-level in config_step_1.1_runtime.json.
step_1_1._min_rows_for_dataset_comment: STEP 1.1 keeps only rows with event_count_column >= this threshold (selected_rows/requested_rows fallback chain).
step_1_1._metadata_prefix_comment: TT prefix for STEP 1.1 global-rate derivation. 'auto' uses task_ids and prioritizes the most advanced task prefix with fallback to older prefixes.
step_1_1._efficiency_metadata_source_task_id_comm: Task ID that provides optional task_<id>_metadata_efficiency.csv sidecar data for STEP 1.1. Use null or 'same' to read efficiency metadata from the same task_id as the main collection stage.
step_1_1._parameter_space_columns_comment: STEP 1.1 parameter-space selector. Use 'auto' (flux + efficiencies + optional cos_n) or an explicit list.
step_1_1._parameter_space_exclude_columns_comment: Columns removed from parameter space even when auto is used.
step_1_1._parameter_space_drop_constant_columns_c: If true, STEP 1.1 removes selected parameter columns that are constant in the selected z-configuration.
step_1_1._drop_unselected_parameter_columns_from_: If true, STEP 1.1 removes non-selected parameter columns from collected_data.csv.

step_1_2._transform_keep_columns_comment: Legacy fallback for STEP 1.2 materialized columns when config_step_1.2_feature_space.json is absent. Exact names or wildcard patterns are allowed; config_step_1.2_feature_space.json is now the preferred source of truth.
step_1_2._feature_space_plot_pairs_comment: Each pair [x,y] is rendered in STEP 1.2 as full-range + zoomed central-region feature-space panels.
step_1_2._feature_space_plot_zoom_quantiles_comme: Central quantile window [q_low, q_high] for the zoomed feature-space region plots.
step_1_2._feature_space_plot_sample_max_rows_comm: Maximum sampled rows used to render feature-space region plots for speed/readability.
step_1_2._feature_space_plot_random_seed_comment: Deterministic random seed for feature-space plot row sampling.
step_1_2._feature_scatter_matrix_max_side_comment: Maximum number of feature columns plotted per side in the STEP 1.2 scatter matrix (caps the 1_2_4_feature_scatter_matrix.png grid).
step_1_2._min_simulated_efficiency_comment: Rows with any eff_sim_i below this threshold are removed in STEP 1.2.
step_1_2._max_simulated_efficiency_spread_comment: Rows where max(eff_sim) - min(eff_sim) exceeds this value are removed in STEP 1.2.
step_1_2._feature_matrix_plot_include_rate_histog: Controls matrix-plot display in STEP 1.2 and STEP 1.4. true: include all events_per_second_<bin>_rate_hz columns. false: suppress those columns and show one blank placeholder row/column for the histogram block.
step_1_2._dictionary_exclude_rows_with_all_sim_ef: If true, STEP 1.2 excludes dictionary candidates where eff_sim_1 == eff_sim_2 == eff_sim_3 == eff_sim_4.
step_1_2._dictionary_paramset_prototype_comment: How STEP 1.2 builds dictionary support from quality-passing candidates: all_candidates (no param-set deduplication), max_events (legacy one-row per param set), mean_numeric, or median_numeric. all_candidates preserves stochastic feature clouds and can reduce inverse-map aliasing.
step_1_2._eff_fit_polynomial_order_comment: Polynomial order n for empirical-vs-simulated fits used in STEP 1.2 and STEP 4.2 efficiency correction.
step_1_2._continuity_validation_comment: Dictionary continuity checks in STEP 1.2. fail_on_error=true aborts on FAIL status, preventing silent use of ambiguous dictionaries. local_continuity_* controls CV-based smoothness in feature->parameter inverse mapping. topology_* controls bidirectional neighborhood continuity (parameter<->feature) using kNN overlap and neighborhood expansion ratios. injectivity_* enforces local feature-space injectivity by limiting parameter-span spread inside feature-neighborhoods (especially flux). out_of_support_max_fraction: max allowed fraction of dataset outside dictionary range per eff plane. density_grid_bins: grid resolution for uniformity. density_ratio_max: max ratio max/median density. filter_enabled=true removes rows flagged by continuity checks before final save; filter_max_drop_fraction limits removals unless filter_allow_large_drop=true. filter_include_topology/filter_include_injectivity toggle those flags in filtering. feature_selection_size_penalty applies an optional per-feature complexity penalty when ranking STEP 1.2 feature subsets.

step_1_3._dataset_holdout_fraction_comment: STEP 1.3 split fraction for holdout dataset (evaluation set not used in dictionary training).
step_1_3._split_random_seed_comment: Deterministic split seed for dictionary/holdout split.
step_1_3._split_group_column_comment: Group-aware split column (auto -> param_set_id, then param_hash_x, else row-random).
step_1_3._dictionary_min_events_comment: Primary STEP 1.3 quality cut for dictionary rows. Lowered from 150000 to 70000 so newly generated parameter points are still eligible while keeping a strict event-count cut.
step_1_3._dictionary_relerr_comment: Secondary dictionary quality cuts: |eff_empirical - eff_sim| / eff_sim [%] per plane.
step_1_3._dictionary_require_finite_columns_comme: Simple sanity filter: remove dictionary rows with missing values in these key columns.

step_1_4._feature_columns_comment: Feature-space columns for continuity and neighborhood correspondence. 'auto' loads STEP 1.3 selected_feature_columns.json.
step_1_4._parameter_columns_comment: Parameter-space columns used to compute component-wise absolute deltas against nearest feature neighbors. 'auto' loads STEP 1.1 parameter_space_columns.json.
step_1_4._neighborhood_matrix_plot_sample_max_row: Maximum background rows shown in STEP 1.4 neighborhood correspondence matrices (selected neighborhood points are always kept).
step_1_4._param_to_feature_ball_convex_enabled_co: Optional extra STEP 1.4 plot (parameter-ball to feature-hull). false keeps only the bidirectional neighborhood matrices.

step_1_5._feature_distance_definition_comment: Distance mode for feature space. 'auto' tries all normalization×Lp combos and per-feature weights via LOO on dictionary. Options: auto | l2_robust_zscore | l2_standard_zscore | l2_raw | l1_robust_zscore | l1_standard_zscore | l1_raw (legacy aliases: l2_zscore, l1_zscore).
step_1_5._feature_group_config_json_comment: Optional override for STEP 1.5 feature-group definitions. Defaults to config_step_1.5_feature_groups.json when present.

step_2_1._feature_space_source_comment: Feature-space keys (feature_columns, derived_features, include_global_rate, global_rate_col) are inherited from top-level common_feature_space unless explicitly overridden here.
step_2_1._shared_parameter_exclusion_mode_comment: Options: 'off' | 'full' | 'partial'. 'off' keeps continuity-focused neighbor selection; 'full' excludes candidates only when all selected physical parameters coincide; 'partial' excludes when any selected physical parameter coincides.
step_2_1._shared_parameter_exclusion_columns_comm: 'auto' uses estimated parameter columns; list/CSV string allowed.
step_2_1._shared_parameter_match_atol_comment: Absolute tolerance for numeric equality checks in shared-parameter candidate exclusion.
step_2_1._exclude_dictionary_like_plots_comment: STEP 2.1 diagnostics/plots (distance and true-vs-estimated) exclude dictionary-origin or dictionary-equivalent rows so near-zero artifacts do not bias visual interpretation.
step_2_1._density_correction_enabled_comment: STEP 2.1-local override. false avoids feature-space density reweighting, which can over-amplify flux outliers.
step_2_1._interpolation_k_comment: Legacy fallback for inverse mapping neighbor count. Prefer step_2_1.inverse_mapping.neighbor_selection + neighbor_count.
step_2_1._inverse_mapping_comment: Inverse mapping from feature space to parameter space. estimation_mode: single_stage|two_stage_eff_then_flux|two_stage_eff_address_then_flux. neighbor_selection: nearest|knn|all. weighting: uniform|inverse_distance|softmax. aggregation: weighted_mean|weighted_median|local_linear. stage2_efficiency_conditioning_weight controls flux-stage penalty to efficiency mismatch in two-stage modes. stage2_efficiency_gate_max and stage2_efficiency_gate_min_candidates define the hard address gate in two_stage_eff_address_then_flux. histogram_distance_blend_mode: normalized|raw. efficiency_vector_distance controls the grouped X/Y/theta efficiency-vector distance family. Note: once a STEP 1.5 distance_definition.json artifact is loaded, grouped vector terms are taken from that artifact and runtime estimation is forced back to single_stage; the legacy stage2_* group toggles are not used in that post-STEP-1.5 path.

step_2_2._exclude_dictionary_like_comment: STEP 2.2 computes both all-rows and off-dict-strict metrics. Top-level summary keys use off-dict-strict as primary scope by default.
step_2_2._plot_population_comment: Population used for STEP 2.2 plots: 'off_dict_strict' (recommended realism) or 'all'.

step_2_3._n_bins_per_param_comment: Set an integer to use the same bins for all parameters, or a dict with per-parameter bin counts.
step_2_3._exclude_dictionary_entries_comment: If true, rows marked true_is_dictionary_entry are removed before LUT/error calculations.
step_2_3._relerr_filter_pct_comment: Signed relative-error window [min, max] (%) applied before histogramming and LUT statistics.
step_2_3._outlier_iqr_factor_comment: Outliers are defined as points outside [Q1 - factor*IQR, Q3 + factor*IQR].

step_3_1._path_overrides_comment: Optional source_csv/rate_dictionary_csv overrides are defined in config_step_1.1_runtime.json.
step_3_1._curve_data_mode_comment: STEP 3.1 owns the high-level curve mode. 'synthetic_data_curve' first defines a parameter-space curve and lets STEP 3.2 synthesize feature-space rows. 'dataset_data_curve' builds the curve directly from real dataset rows and STEP 3.2 copies those exact entries.
step_3_1._source_table_comment: dataset or dictionary. Used when source_csv is null.
step_3_1._parameter_curve_columns_comment: Parameter-space columns used to generate the STEP 3.1 curve. Columns must exist in the rate dictionary.
step_3_1._identical_efficiencies_comment: If true, all available eff_sim_i curve coordinates are forced to the same trajectory as eff_sim_1.
step_3_1._flux_range_comment: Set [min, max] for flux movement. Use equal values for constant flux.
step_3_1._eff_range_comment: Set [min, max] for efficiency movement. Use equal values for constant efficiency.
step_3_1._dense_points_comment: High-resolution points used for event integration along the smooth trajectory.
step_3_1._random_seed_comment: (1784447138, 1168061690 was nice) - Set an integer to reproduce exactly the same curve. Null means random seed each run (saved in summary JSON).
step_3_1._events_per_file_comment: Target counts per synthetic file used to discretize the trajectory.
step_3_1._include_partial_last_file_comment: If true, include final partial segment when remaining events are below events_per_file.
step_3_1._weighted_feature_columns_comment: Feature-space columns synthesized by weighted averaging over dictionary points. Use 'auto' or an explicit list.
step_3_1._weighting_top_k_comment: Top-K nearest dictionary points (in parameter space) kept per curve point for weighting.
step_3_1._weighting_power_comment: Inverse-distance exponent p used in weights 1/(distance^p).
step_3_1._n_harmonics_comment: Higher values add more local structure while staying smooth.
step_3_1._roughness_comment: Higher values suppress high-frequency components (smoother look).

step_3_2._path_overrides_comment: Optional CSV path overrides moved to config_step_1.1_runtime.json.
step_3_2._weighting_source_comment: STEP 3.2 now follows the STEP 3.1 curve_data_mode. For synthetic_data_curve it still uses step_1_3.simple_weighting / weighting_shared to synthesize feature-space rows. For dataset_data_curve it copies the exact STEP 3.1 source rows and bypasses STEP 3.2 row selection.

step_4_1._station_id_comment: Station selector for STEP 4 real-data collection. Use 1 or 'MINGO01'. Null falls back to top-level station_id.
step_4_1._task_ids_comment: Task IDs for STEP 4 real-data collection (e.g. [1] or [1,2,3,4,5]). Null falls back to top-level task_ids.
step_4_1._efficiency_metadata_source_task_id_comm: Task ID that provides optional task_<id>_metadata_efficiency.csv sidecar data for STEP 4.1. Use null or 'same' to read efficiency metadata from the same task_id as the main collection stage.
step_4_1._path_overrides_comment: Optional dictionary_csv/build_summary_json path overrides moved to config_step_1.1_runtime.json.
step_4_1._timestamp_column_comment: Column used for latest-execution aggregation per filename_base.
step_4_1._date_from_comment: Optional ISO 8601 lower bound applied to data-time parsed from filename_base (inclusive).
step_4_1._date_to_comment: Optional ISO 8601 upper bound applied to data-time parsed from filename_base (inclusive).
step_4_1._event_count_column_comment: Column used for event-count filtering/histogram. 'auto' picks the best TT_1234 count-like column, then falls back to global_rate*duration.
step_4_1._min_n_events_comment: STEP 4.1 keeps only rows with event count strictly greater than this threshold. Set null to disable.
step_4_1._timeline_freq_comment: Pandas time-floor frequency used for timeline coverage plot bins (e.g., D, 12H, W).

step_4_2._criteria_source_comment: STEP 4.2 matching criteria are always inherited from step_2_1, with feature-space keys first resolved from top-level common_feature_space then optional step_2_1 overrides (feature_columns, distance_metric, interpolation_k, include_global_rate). Global-rate columns are auto-detected in STEP 4.x diagnostics.
step_4_2._inherit_step_2_1_method_comment: If true (recommended), STEP 4.2 uses the exact same inference method and feature-space definition as STEP 2.1, without STEP 4.2-specific neighbor/feature overrides.
step_4_2._efficiency_source_prefix_mode_comment: How STEP 4.2 computes eff*_from_data for diagnostics/plots. 'feature_consistent' uses the same prefix ordering as inference features (recommended). 'task_chain' keeps legacy task-priority prefixes.
step_4_2._shared_parameter_exclusion_ignore_comme: Only used when inherit_step_2_1_method=false. Parameter-space columns to ignore in shared-parameter exclusion. Keep empty if cos_n or other dimensions should participate normally.
step_4_2._n_events_column_comment: Column used as n_events for LUT interpolation. 'auto' selects the best available count-like column.
step_4_2._coverage_frequency_comment: Time-bin frequency for coverage-fraction plot when timestamps are available.
